verses.text: Tua ciangin kamsang Elisha in kamsangte' sung pan khat samin ama kiangah, “Kithawi in la, hih sathau biing tawi-in Ramothgilead-ah va pai in
Na tun' ciangin Nimshi' tapa Jehoshafat, a tapa Jehu tua lai-ah va zong in. Tua ciangin pai-in a lawmte lak panin a paikhiat ding sawl in la, inndei sungnung khat sungah amah paipih in

Tua ciangin sathau biing la-in ama lu tungah sung in la, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel tungah kumpi-in sathau kong nilh hi, ci hi,’ va ci in. Tua ciangin kongkhak hong in la tai in; zekai kei in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin kamsang tangvalpa Ramothgilead-ah pai hi

Amah a tun' ciangin, galkap a ukte in thu kikupna na nei uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “A ukpa aw, nang tungah thugen ding khat ka nei hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jehu in, “Kote lakah kua' tungah nei na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Nangma tung hi, a ukpa aw,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin amah dingin inn khat sungah a paikhawm uh hi. Tua ciangin tangvalpa in ama lu tungah a sathau sungin ama kiangah, “Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Israel mite tung, Topa' mite tungah kumpi-in nang sathau kong nilh hi
Kamsang ka nasemte a thahna leh Topa' nasemte khempeuh a thahna hangin Jezebel' tungah phu ka laktheihna dingin na topa Ahab' innkuan na satpuk ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Ahab innkuan sia ding hi. Israel sungah keimah in Ahab innkuan panin sal hita leh sal a hilo hita leh pasal khempeuh ka beisak ding hi
Tua ciangin keimah in Nebat' tapa Jeroboam innkuan leh Ahijah' tapa Baasha' innkuan bangin Ahab' innkuan ka bawl ding hi
Tua ciangin uite in Jezreel khua sungah Jezebel ne-in, kuamah in amah vuilo ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in kongkhak hongin a taikhia hi

A topa' nasemte kiangah Jehu hong pusuah ciangin amaute in ama kiangah, “Thu khempeuh a hoih hiam? Bang hangin hih mihaipa nang kiangah hong pai ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in amaute kiangah, “A mipa leh a thugen na thei uh hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amaute in, “Tua thu ka thei kei uh hi. Tu-in ko kiangah hong gen in,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Tua bang tua bangin amah in kei kiangah thu hong genin, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Israel tungah kumpi-in nang sathau kong nilh hi,” ci hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin nawhsa-in mi khempeuh in a puan uh la-in ama din'na dingin kahlei tungah phah uh a, tua ciangin amaute in peengkul tumin, “Jehu, kumpi hi,” ci-in a taangko uh hi.
Tua ciangin Nimshi' tapa Jehoshafat, a tapa Jehu in Joram sawmsim hi. (Tu-in Syria kumpi Hazael langpangin Ramothgilead-ah Israel khempeuh tawh khuacingin Joram om hi

Ahih hangin Syria kumpi Hazael tawh a kido lai-in Syria-te in amah a liamsakna mate Jezreel khua-ah a kidamsak dingin Kumpi Joram ciahkik khinta hi.) Tua ahih ciangin Jehu in a ulianpihte kiangah, “Kei hong pawlpih nuam peuhmah in, mi khatpeuh Jezreel-ah pai-in thu a va ko dingin hih khuapi panin kuamah a paikhiatkhak lohna ding thei un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jehu a leeng tungah kahin Jezreel-ah pai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua lai-ah Joram lum hi. A tun' ciangin Joram' kiangah a hawh dingin Judah kumpipa Ahaziah na tung khin hi

Tua laitakin Jezreel tausang tungah galvilpa ding a, amah hong pai laitakin Jehu' pawlte amah in mukhia a, “Mi honkhat ka mu hi,” ci hi. Tua ciangin Joram in, “Sakol tung tuang mi khat la-in amaute a dawn dingin sawl in la, ‘Thuhoih ahi hiam?’ cisak in,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin sakol tung tuangin amah a dawn dingin mi khat pai a, “Kumpipa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Thuhoih ahi hiam?’ ci hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jehu in, “Thuhoih tawh bang hih ding na hi hiam? Kihem in la ka nungah hong pai in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin galvilpa in thu zasakin, “Kamtaipa in amaute kiang ban a, ahih hangin amah hong kilehkik lo hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amah in sakol tung tuang a nihna sawlin amaute kiangah tuapa paisak a, “Kumpipa in hih bangin hong ci khin hi: ‘Thuhoih ahi hiam?’ ci hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jehu in dawngin, “Thuhoih tawh bang hih ding na hi hiam? Kihem in la ka nungah hong pai in,” a ci hi

Galvilpa in thu zasak kikin, “Amah in amaute va ban a, ahih hangin amah zong hong kilehkik lo hi. A leeng hawlzia pen Nimshi' tapa Jehu' hawl tawh kibang hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in nakpi takin nawhhawl hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Joram in, “Kithawi un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in a leeng kithawisak uh hi. Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa Joram leh Judah kumpipa Ahaziah, a sakol leeng tuak uhah tuangin dingkhia uh a, Jehu a dawntuah dingin pai uh a, Jezreel mi Naboth' lo-ah amah tawh kituak uh hi
Joram in Jehu a muh ciangin, “Jehu aw, thuhoih ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Na nu Jezebel' paktatnate leh aisannate tua zahin a tam laiteng bang thuhoih om thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Joram in a sakol kamkaih lehhei-in tai a, Ahaziah kiangah, “Ahaziah aw, gal om!” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jehu in a tha neih khempeuh tawh a thal keekin Joram' liangko kikal kap a, a thaltang in a lungtang pailetin a leeng sungah amah a puksuk hi

Jehu in amah a huhpa Bidkar kiangah, “Amah tawmto in la, Jezreel mi Naboth' neihsa lo lai-ah amah paii in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang leh kei, a pa Ahab' nungah mai kimin i tuan' laitakin amah langpangin Topa in hih thu a genna phawk in

‘Za ni-in Naboth leh a tapate a kithahna ka muh taktak mah bangin leitang tung hih munah nang kong thuk ding hi,’ Topa in ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Topa' thugen bangin amah tawmin tua mun leitang tungah amah paii in,” a ci hi.

Judah kumpipa Ahaziah in hih thu a muh ciangin Bethhaggan lamah a tai hi. Tua ciangin Jehu in amah delhin, “Amah zong kap un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Ibleam gei, Gur kahtohna san a leeng sungah amah kap uh hi. Ahih hangin amah Megiddo khuapi ciangdong taizo lai a, tua khua-ah a si hi
A nasemte in leeng khat tawh Jerusalem-ah amah pua uh a, David khuapi sung ama hanah a vui uh hi
Ahab' tapa Joram' kum sawmlekhatna kumin Ahaziah in Judah tungah uk ding a kipan ahi hi.
Jezreel khua-ah Jehu hong tun' ciangin Jezebel in a thu na za hi. Amah in a mitte zutin a lutang zem a, tawletah khuadak hi
Kulhkongpi-ah Jehu hong lut laitakin Jezebel in, “Nang Zimri! A topa a thatpa aw, bang hih-a hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin tawlet lamah Jehu khuadak to-in, “Kei' lamah kua om na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Innsung maangte nih khawng thum khawng in amah hong ensuk hi
Jehu in, “Amah hong lawnsuk un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Jezebel lawnsuk uh hi. A sisan pawlkhat kulh tung leh sakolte tungah kitheh a, tua ciangin amaute in amah tuancil uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute sungtumin an ne-in tui a dawn uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Tu-in a kisamsia hih numei tawm un la, phum un. Bangbang ahi ta zongin amah kumpipa' tanu hibuang hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin amah a phum dingin amaute a pai uh ciangin a lu guh leh a khete leh a khutpeek simloh bangmah dang mu nawnlo uh hi
Amaute hong paikikin Jehu kiangah a gen uh ciangin amah in, “Hih pen a nasempa, Tishbe mi Elijah tung tawnin Topa' gensa ahi hi: ‘Jezreel khua sungah uite in Jezebel' sa ne ding uh hi
Tua ciangin Jezebel' luanghawm pen Jezreel khuasung lei maitang tungah eklei tawh kibang ding hi. Tua ahih manin kuamah in, “Hih pen Jezebel hi,” cih theilo ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi.
